title: Borreria brittonii
taxonomy: Borreria brittonii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Borreria, which is a part of the tribe Spermacoceae. The plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, specifically in countries such as Costa Rica and Panama. Borreria brittonii is a shrub that grows up to a certain height, and its classification further categorizes it as a member of the family Rubiaceae. The classification of Borreria brittonii is essential for understanding its characteristics, habits, and ecological significance.
